history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot of a young man with dark, messy hair, wearing a black hooded sweatshirt. His head is tilted back slightly, and he is looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression. The hoodie is pulled up, framing his face, and the drawstrings are visible. The background is a plain, light beige wall, providing a soft, unobtrusive backdrop. The lighting is soft and diffused, casting gentle shadows that highlight the contours of his face and the texture of his hair and hoodie. The color palette is dominated by the black of the hoodie and the muted tones of the background and skin, creating a somewhat moody and intimate atmosphere. The style is realistic, with a focus on portraiture.
